```{=html}
<!-- mutate() - simple example -->
<script>
window.MS_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '4750'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5000']
];
window.MS_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
</script>
```

::: {.ms-stage-wrap}
<div id="ms-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .ms-frag id="ms-result"}
[]{.fragment .ms-frag id="ms-highlight-new"}
